source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, after the automatic forward and reverse control circuit is connected, before conducting a powered test run, manually simulate the operation of each device and use a digital multimeter to check continuity. The specific operation is as follows: Connect the test leads to terminals "0" and "1", hold down the start button SB1, then manually toggle the position switch SQ1 and return it to its original position. Observe the multimeter reading.
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The value briefly increases and then returns to the contactor circuit resistance

choice_map.B: The value briefly increases and then returns to the contactor circuit resistance
choice_map.C: Maintains the contactor circuit resistance value
